site.name: Space Heard Us
site.description: We are a youth nonprofit band on a mission to spread joy through music and support those in need.

home.heroSubtitle: Space Heard Us is a youth nonprofit band dedicated to using music as a force for good, performing for communities and inspiring change.
home.missionText: We believe music has the power to heal, connect, and transform. Through performances and community events, we bring joy to those who need it most.
home.volunteerText: Join our team of volunteers and be part of something meaningful.
home.contactText: Send us a message for performances, collaboration, or volunteer questions.
